package_title: I will run a monthly AI-agent retainer for your marketing agency
description:
🔧 I will run a monthly AI-agent retainer for your marketing agency

I operate an agent that researches prospects, drafts outreach, and posts approved content using n8n + Hermes/OpenClaw + Crawl4AI + pgvector + Listmonk — all free/self-hosted.

✅ What you get:
• A live AI agent working for you every month (not a one-off build)
• Free, open-source tools (you own the stack, no SaaS lock-in)
• Charge $2,000–$4,500/mo retainer; <$15/mo inference
• Weekly report + monthly strategy call

📦 Tiers:
• Pilot ($1000/mo, 1 week): 1 agent, Core workflow, Email support, Weekly report
• Growth ($3000/mo, 1 week): 2–3 agents, CRM/marketplace hooks, Loom updates, Monthly call
• Scale ($6000/mo, 2 weeks): Unlimited agents, Full autonomy, Priority support, Quarterly roadmap

🚀 How it works:
1. You tell me the process to automate (form on order)
2. I build + deploy the agent on your infra
3. I monitor, improve, and report every month

⚡ Why me: I run the same agent stack that powers a 100-skill autonomous company.

n8n_workflow.name: deliver-agent-agencies
